lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: 'elo... *hic*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another cloak?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: They call me Two pints... I'm the taskmaster for the Ardougne Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do they call you Two pints?

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: I'm not too sure really... my memory isn't the greatest... *hic*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe you lost a game of Runelink and had to change your name as a forfeit?

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: Perhaps... *hic* I know a great drinking game for that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Suddenly it all makes sense...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In and around Ardougne it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will reward you.

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement diary.

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: Well, there are four different Ardougne cloaks, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards would you like to

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: know more about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Easy rewards please!

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: If you complete all of the easy tasks in Ardougne: The Citizen in West Ardougne will buy cats for 200 death runes each, some drops in the Tower of Life will be noted and the cape can teleport you to the Monastery

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: south of Ardougne too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Medium rewards please!

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: In addition to the easy rewards: Wizard Cromperty will give you 100 noted pure essence each day, even more drops will be noted in the Tower of Life, you've got a 10% better chance at pickpocketing in Ardougne, you

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: can toggle the ring of life to teleport to Ardougne, you get three teleports each day to the Ardougne farming patch and you can hold up to 56 coin pouches whilst pickpocketing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Hard rewards please!

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: In addition to the easy and medium benefits: Wizard Cromperty will give you 150 pure essence each day, you can toggle the Watchtower teleport to the centre of Yanille, claim further drops as notes in the Tower of

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: Life, teleports to the farming patch increased to five per day, have a 10% better chance at pickpocketing everywhere and you can hold up to 84 coin pouches whilst pickpocketing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Elite rewards please!

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards: Wizard Cromperty will give you 250 pure essence every day, you will catch 50% more fish from the Fishing Trawler and receive 25% more marks of grace on the

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: Ardougne agility course. Your cape will have unlimited teleports to the Ardougne farming patch, Bert will automatically deliver your daily sand and you can hold up to 140 coin pouches whilst pickpocketing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I claim the rewards?

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: Just complete the tasks in Ardougne so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: See you later!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Ardougne achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: This cloak is a symbol of your exploration of Ardougne. The Citizen in West Ardougne will buy cats for 200 death runes each, some drops in the Tower of Life will be noted and the cape can teleport you to the

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: Monastery south of Ardougne too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: If you ever lose your cloak, come back to me to reclaim it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Ardougne achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: I've upgraded your Ardougne cloak for you. Wizard Cromperty will give you 100 noted pure essence each day, even more drops will be noted in the Tower of Life, you've got a 10% better chance at pickpocketing in

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: Ardougne, you can toggle the ring of life to teleport to Ardougne, you get three teleports each day to the Ardougne farming patch and you can hold up to 56 coin pouches whilst pickpocketing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Ardougne achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: I've upgraded your Ardougne cloak for you. Wizard Cromperty will give you 150 pure essence each day, you can toggle the Watchtower teleport to the centre of Yanille, claim further drops as notes in the Tower of

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: Life, teleports to the farming patch increased to five per day, have a 10% better chance at pickpocketing everywhere and you can hold up to 84 coin pouches whilst pickpocketing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Ardougne achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: What, with your stats? I don't believe you. You'd need a Smithing level of 91. Ask me again when you've got your Smithing level up.

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in Ardougne! Here's your reward!

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: I've upgraded your Ardougne cloak for you. Wizard Cromperty will give you 250 pure essence every day, you will catch 50% more fish from the Fishing Trawler and receive 25% more marks of grace on the

lines.speaker: Two-pints
lines.text: Ardougne agility course. Your cape will have unlimited teleports to the Ardougne farming patch, Bert will automatically deliver your daily sand and you can hold up to 140 coin pouches whilst pickpocketing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!
